name: chr3_3q13_31_LSAMP_HSPA8_SD
description: 3q13.31 SD-rich block downstream of LSAMP, containing flanking duplications that contribute to rare ~1 Mb microdeletions and to the IgLON-family paralog signal (LSAMP, OPCML, NTM, NEGR1).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair of 15-50 kb at ~93% identity; IgLON Ig-domain paralog signal dispersed to chr1, chr11.
